location: Dropped by a Valiant Gargoyle that swoops down onto the long staircase northeast of the Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace in the Capital Outskirts.
tactics: From Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace, head northeast up the long stairway; the gargoyle drops in from above partway up
It dual-wields a greatsword and halberd — Vacuum Slice from the sword hits at range, and the halberd has a Storm Assault-style leaping attack, so stay mobile
This particular gargoyle has no boss health bar and doesn't respawn once killed, so there's only one chance at it per playthrough (barring NG+)
lore: A bronze greataxe wielded by the Valiant Gargoyles, cobbled together from mismatched parts and mended with corpse wax, much like the stitched-together guardians who carry it.

builds.name: Pure Strength bruiser
builds.why: C-rank Strength scaling with a low Dexterity requirement makes it a solid early-to-mid Strength pick.

builds.name: War Cry aggro build
builds.why: Default War Cry skill boosts attack rating for sustained damage windows.
